info.name: Myco Meld
info.attribution:
The Mushroom Girl icons were made by Olesya Kozlova (https://thenounproject.com/browse/collection-icon/mushroom-8280/) and are under the Public Domain License. The background image is "Gnome stump house in autumn forest" by upklyak (https://www.freepik.com/free-vector/gnome-stump-house-autumn-forest_143368136.htm) under the Free License. The font used in the title is Aladin, by Google Fonts (licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1).

The room layout, design, coding, and library image by Habanero are released to the Public Domain under CC0.
info.description: Search the forest for the best hidden mushrooms in this deduction poker-like game.
info.ruleText:
Myco Meld is a poker-like game where your starting hand isn't your own, but everyone else's potential hand instead. The game is played with 32 cards divided into 4 suits, with ranks ranging 1 through 8. Players arrange their initial hand in ascending rank order and place it facedown before them in their tableau. Starting with the one card they then draw, players have to try and deduce where other cards they need might be to form the strongest poker hand. After four turns of claiming facedown cards (3 mushrooms and 1 pot, which reveals the card for everyone), they then gather their claimed cards and compare hands. In the final turn, players may claim one of the Center Cards.
The strength of your hand is similar to Poker (Pair, Straight, Full House, etc.). The players with the strongest and second-strongest hands score points for that round. The game continues for as many rounds as there are players.

Hand Scores:

Rank / 1st Place / 2nd Place

2–3 Players:

    1 | 5 pts | 3 pts | 4 of a Kind
    2 | 3 pts | 2 pts | Full House
    3 | 3 pts | 1 pt  | Straight
    4 | 4 pts | 1 pt  | 3 of a Kind, or a 4 Straight
    5 | 2 pts | 1 pt  | Pair
    6 | 2 pts | 1 pt  | All other cards

4 Players:

    1 | 5 pts | 4 pts | 4 of a Kind
    2 | 4 pts | 2 pts | Full House
    3 | 3 pts | 2 pts | Straight
    4 | 3 pts | 2 pts (3oaK) or 1 pt (4S) | 3 of a Kind, or a 4 Straight
    5 | 2 pts | 1 pt  | Pair
    6 | 2 pts | 1 pt  | All other cards
info.helpText:
The game is mostly automated, with correct setups depending on player count. Here's what you'll need to do.

  1. Press the dial to randomly determine the first player.
  2. Press "Start" to deal initial hands.
  3. Press "Lay Hand" after sorting your hand in numeral order. Your cards should then be placed onto the tableau in the same order. If it isn't for some reason, rearrange them (and report it as a bug).
  4. In turn order, manually draw 1 card from the 4 in the center. There might be one left over, in which case it's unused.
  5. Place your tokens on the cards you claim. When the round is over and all 4 tokens have been placed, press 'Claim Cards" to get your claimed cards.
  6. Compare poker hands against the score chart.
  7. Press "Start / Next Round" to automatically gather all non-removed cards and re-deal for the next round.
